strengths: 15+ years software engineering experience with multiple staff/senior titles across distributed systems, microservices, and real-time backend architectures
Documented expertise building high-throughput, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second with real-time metadata and performance databases
Architect and founder of GISCollective platform demonstrating ability to design event-driven systems and sustain long-term technical projects
concerns: Only 6 months of documented AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq; multi-agent production systems experience required but not credibly demonstrated at required depth or scale
No evidence of team scaling, people leadership, or building internal technical-leadership layer—all staff/senior IC titles with no manager-level or executive track record
Minimal fintech-domain expertise (15 months at RIDE Capital only) with no demonstrated experience in credit risk assessment, payment flows, compliance, or regulated environments

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated team scaling and executive leadership capability

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with solid distributed-systems credentials, but the role requires a CTO with proven multi-agent AI architecture at production scale, demonstrated ability to build and lead engineering organizations (10–30+ people), and deep fintech-infrastructure domain knowledge. The resume shows only 6 months of tangential AI work, no executive-level leadership experience, minimal fintech exposure, and recent career instability (6-month tenure, 8-month gap). This is a mismatch between strong IC skills and executive role requirements that cannot be bridged by general engineering capability.
